narrative:
Bethlehem (precinct in Coshocton County) has 765 registered voters, with 44.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
